---
title: ""
subtitle: "Copyright Raphaële Slimane, All Rights Reserved."


listing:
  contents: things
  type: grid
  image-height: "100%"
  sort-ui: [date,categories]
  sort: "date desc"
  grid-columns: 3
  page-size: 30
  grid-item-border: true
  fields: [image]
  categories: false
  #template: cards.ejs
  
format:
  html:
    theme: 
      light: litera
      dark: slate
    page-layout: article
---
